## philosophy
- follow the trends
- read and write
- follow the time line

## timeline

- 20200125
    - [analysis of 27 available genomes of 2019-nCoV](http://virological.org/t/clock-and-tmrca-based-on-27-genomes/347)
    - a common source—as early as 1 October
    - estimating the evolutionary rate and timing of the epidemic(MRCA)
    - tree
        - PhyML
        - single-point introduction into the human population followed by sustained human-to-human transmission
    - Evolutionary rate
        -

- 20200126
    - Wuhan seafood market may not be source of novel virus spreading globally
        - 13 of the 41 cases had no link to the marketplace either
        - 1 December timing of the first confirmed case was “an interesting tidbit”

- 20200127
    - Can an anti-HIV combination or other existing drugs outwit the new coronavirus?
        - lopinavir/ritonavir in combination with interferon beta-1b in randomized
        - protease inhibitor
        - interferon beta-1b(boosts immune responses by unclear mechanisms)

- 20200130
    - rt-pcr seq
    >SLICE_21852–22427


    - https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/genbank/2019-ncov-seqs/
        - first genome 20200105
    - https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/summary.html#background
        - cdc get from ncbi
